arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Athletic Bilbao 2-1 Real Madrid
arts.sum: An early attack through Nico Williams was an indicator of how difficult this game was going to be - but Kylian Mbappé looked like he had made the task a whole lot easier after scoring past the keeper, only to be called out by VAR for being offside. The top of the table was only a few points away for Real Madrid, but a trip to Athletic Bilbao has proven to be a tough hurdle to jump in recent seasons.

arts.ttl: Which teams could Real Madrid play in the FIFA Club World Cup?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will discover their group for the revamped Club World Cup this Thursday in Miami at 7:00 p.m. As Atlético are excluded due to being from the same country as Real Madrid, Madrid could only face Benfica, Juventus, or Salzburg from this pot .
